LSE-HS9-L4-BR300-HSSCIES-RWS-CFI-01 • HS Science: Earth & Space Science • Big Bang Theory Evidence • Real-World Simulation • Cultural Fusion & Innovation

The Festival Booth

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What is the girl trying to decide?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Say three things: who is coming, what the boy says, and what the girl has to choose. Short sentences are okay.
